## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused.
- [ ] I updated docs for user-facing or architectural changes.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where practical.
- [ ] I avoided introducing hidden single-manager assumptions.
